name: Living Room
description: Curated pieces that transform living spaces into sanctuaries of comfort and style. Each item is selected for its ability to balance form with everyday function.

name: Dining Room
description: Where craftsmanship meets conviviality. Our dining collection celebrates the ritual of gathering, with tables and chairs designed for lingering conversations.

name: Bedroom
description: A retreat from the world. Our bedroom collection prioritizes serenity through clean lines, natural materials, and a palette drawn from the earth.

name: Office
description: Workspaces designed to inspire. Our office collection merges productivity with aesthetics, creating environments where ideas flourish.
